caption: A person with blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt is shown in a small inset window in the bottom-left corner of each frame, while the main view focuses on a large metal bowl filled with popped popcorn. Some of the popcorn is white, and some is tinted blue or green. A hand enters the frame from the top and stirs the popcorn, moving it around the bowl. The logo "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" appears in the top-left corner of each scene against a backdrop of blue sky and white clouds. As the sequence progresses, the hand continues to mix the colored popcorn, shifting the distribution of the white and blue-green kernels throughout the bowl. The woman in the inset window remains visible and stationary, observing the process as the mixing occurs.
